name: J1939SetChecksumAndCounter
title: J1939SetChecksumAndCounter
syntax: long J1939SetChecksumAndCounter(pg * msg, char[] calculationMethod, dword counter)
description: This function calculates and sets the checksum of the given parameter group as well as the given counter. The available calculation algorithms are described in J1939 Functional Safety – Messages With Integrated Checksum and Counter.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: The parameter group to calculate and set the checksum for.

parameters.name: calculationMethod
parameters.description: Two letters in the form [A-E][a-f] (e.g. “Bc”) that define the calculation rule and position of the checksum and message counter.

parameters.name: counter
parameters.description: Current message counter to be set in the given parameter group.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
